| checkout idempotency | `src/checkout/idempotency.ts` | `FLAG_CHECKOUT_IDEMPOTENCY_V3_R1` | `checkout_dedupes_retry_after_timeout_r1` | per-cart idempotency key store | global checkout mutex | preserves shard-local ordering while letting unrelated carts retry independently. |
| search index freshness | `src/search/freshness.ts` | `FLAG_INDEX_EPOCH_GUARD_R1` | `search_rejects_stale_epoch_publish_r1` | epoch-stamped publish barrier | blind last-write-wins publish | prevents a slow crawl from replacing a newer index snapshot. |
| email digest batching | `src/mail/digest.ts` | `FLAG_DIGEST_BATCH_WINDOW_R1` | `digest_batches_by_workspace_timezone_r1` | workspace-local send window | single UTC midnight cron | keeps quiet-hour promises without delaying every workspace behind one global clock. |
| webhook replay protection | `src/webhooks/replay.ts` | `FLAG_WEBHOOK_NONCE_LEDGER_R1` | `webhook_rejects_reused_nonce_r1` | nonce ledger keyed by provider event id | timestamp-only replay window | blocks fast replays even when the attacker stays inside the timestamp tolerance. |
